items.headline: Karros turning corner at the plate? HR signals step in right direction

news_items.headline: Judge says rib originally fractured on dive in Apr...
news_items.summary: Yankees outfielder Aaron Judge said the stress fracture in his right rib stems from him diving for a ball in late April.

news_items.headline: Chapman's grand slam keys 8-RBI day in S.F. win
news_items.summary: Matt Chapman hit two home runs, including a grand slam in a six-run fourth, and tied the Giants' San Francisco-era record with eight RBIs in an 18-3 rout of the Cubs.

news_items.headline: Sources: Yanks to call up right-handed C Sánchez
news_items.summary: The Yankees will recall right-handed catcher Ali Sánchez on Saturday while optioning J.C. Escarra to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Nootbaar has two hits, RBI in return as Cards win
news_items.summary: St. Louis outfielder Lars Nootbaar made an immediate impact in his return from the 60-day injured list with two hits and an RBI in the Cardinals' 10-3 win over the Cincinnati Reds on Friday night.

news_items.headline: Cubs not focused on trade deadline, Hoyer says
news_items.summary: Cubs president of baseball operations Jed Hoyer called the trade deadline "the furthest thing from my mind," while also acknowledging the organization's needs if the Cubs are in the race at that time.

news_items.headline: Dodgers unveil display honoring gay trailblazers
news_items.summary: The Dodgers on Friday unveiled a permanent display honoring LGBTQ+ trailblazers and former players for the team Glenn Burke and Billy Bean, who were the first two major leaguers to say they were gay.

news_items.headline: Sasaki turns in best start of his career before Freeman walks it off
Mets shutout Padres behind solid outing from Christian Scott
news_items.summary: Jared Young and Luis Torrens homer as Mets add to Padres’ rough stretch.

news_items.headline: MLB post-hype check-in: What to make of former big...
news_items.summary: From a vaunted Japanese star to a former No. 1 pick, let's examine some of baseball's young players taking time to hit their stride.

news_items.headline: Passan’s early trade deadline preview for all 30 M...
news_items.summary: As trade season starts up, Jeff Passan identifies the big names who could move.

news_items.headline: Twins 5, Royals 3: Gutsy Zebby and Austin’s arm get it done
news_items.summary: The young pitcher is dang efficient in the middle innings after a rough start… and the young fielder makes GREAT throws.

news_items.summary: The Mets opened their series in San Diego with a 5-0 win over the Padres on Friday night.

news_items.headline: Not worth the wait; Royals fall to Twins
news_items.summary: Another frustrating loss chock full of missed scoring opportunities.

news_items.headline: St. Louis Cardinals and Reds Bullpen Wreck Cincinnati Big Time Friday
news_items.summary: Kyle Leahy’s finish was better than his start and the St. Louis Cardinals bats were more than enough to overcome the Cincinnati Reds Friday night at Busch Stadium with an honorable mention going to the Reds bullpen for a big assist during the latter half of the game.
